project_summary.estimator_summary: Secure analysis extracted 6 opening(s) and 61 hardware set(s). Verify against source PDF before bidding.

door_analysis.closer: 1.0 Door Closer DC62 10 A12 M85 M77 689 C-R
door_analysis.electric_or_access_control: 2.0 Hinge 661HD EPT12C 95IN AL BES; 2.0 Power Transfer EPT-12C PRE; 1.0 Exit Device 2103 MLR TS 630 PRE; 1.0 Automatic Operator BY SECTION 087113; 2.0 Door Position Switch MC7 DKA; 2.0 Actuator BY SECTION 087113; 2.0 Wiring Harness WH-192 BES; 2.0 Wiring Harness WH-6E BES; 2.0 Wiring Harness WH-PROVIDE SUFFICIENT LENGTH TO CONNECT EPT TO LATCHING HARDWARE BES; 1.0 Card Reader BY DIV. 28
remarks: NOTE: Door is normally locked. Outside actuator is disabled. Presenting proper credentials to the card reader will momentarily retract the latch and activate outside actuator. Pressing activated actuator will operate the door. Egress is always allowed. Inside actuator is always active and will momentarily retract the latch of the exit device and operate the door. Door position switch alerts security if door is held open or opened without authorization. Touch bar monitoring switch shunts alarm. In the event of power loss, door will remain locked. During scheduled hours: Exit device latch will be remotely dogged down. Both outside and inside actuators will be active and will operate the door.

hardware_set_review.estimator_note: NOTE: Door is normally locked. Presenting proper credentials to the card reader momentarily releases the lock. Egress is always allowed. project_risks.issue: 6 opening(s) involve electrified or access-control hardware.
project_risks.recommendation: Confirm Div 08 / 26 / 27 / 28 scope split before bidding.

rfi_log.question: For electrified openings (A100A, A100B, A150, A151, A102, C100), confirm responsibility for 120 V power, low-voltage cabling, readers/head-end, fire alarm release, commissioning and programming.
rfi_log.recommendation: Carry Div 8 components only unless explicitly included.
rfi_log.reason: Carry Div 8 components only unless explicitly included.

rfi_log.question: Please provide the complete keying schedule, keyway, cylinder format, construction core requirement and key counts.
rfi_log.recommendation: Carry construction cylinders as an allowance until keying meeting is held.
rfi_log.reason: Carry construction cylinders as an allowance until keying meeting is held.

estimator_notes: 6 opening(s) extracted from the schedule. Verify all marks against the source PDF before submitting bid.
61 hardware set(s) identified; 61 have a complete extracted item list.

supply_only_notes: Submittal package: door, frame and hardware schedules with manufacturer cut sheets, keying schedule, electrified hardware riser, anchor templates.
installation_only_notes: Field-measure all openings before fabrication release. Verify rough-opening size, frame anchor type, and floor condition.
Storage and protection of doors / frames / hardware on site is by GC unless otherwise noted.
exclusions_to_consider: Exclude 120 V power, low-voltage cabling, access-control head-end, intrusion detection programming, fire-alarm tie-in (NIC).
Exclude permits, demolition, painting, drywall patching at frame anchors, floor preparation at thresholds.
allowances_to_consider: Allowance for construction cylinders and final keying meeting attendance.
coordination_items: Coordinate electrified hardware split: Div 08 hardware / Div 26 power / Div 27-28 low-voltage + head-end.
Attend pre-installation meeting with GC, EC, low-voltage, fire alarm and security trades.
Hold formal keying meeting with owner before cylinder fabrication.
